name: Polaris Inc.
business: Polaris Inc. designs, engineers, manufactures and markets powersports vehicles including off-road vehicles (ATVs and side-by-sides), snowmobiles, moto-roadsters, quadricycles, boats, and related parts, garments and accessories. Products are sold online and through a network of approximately 2,400 independent dealers in North America and over 1,500 international dealers and 70 distributors serving over 90 countries. The company operates in three segments: Off Road, On Road, and Marine.

exposures.sentence: Our commercial and government/defense businesses design and manufacture vehicles that support various commercial and government applications for transporting people and hauling equipment, as well as tactical defense vehicles.

The vehicles can be multi-passenger or single passenger, are used for recreation in sports such as fishing and hunting and for trail and dune riding, and for utility purposes on farms, ranches, and construction sites.

The vehicles can be multi-passenger or single passenger, are used for recreation in sports such as fishing and hunting and for trail and dune riding, and for utility purposes on farms, ranches, and construction sites.
The primary commodities used in manufacturing our products are aluminum, steel, copper, petroleum-based resins and certain rare earth metals

We design, engineer, manufacture and market powersports vehicles which include: off-road vehicles ( ORV ), including all-terrain vehicles ( ATV ) and side-by-side vehicles; military and commercial ORVs; snowmobiles; moto-roadsters; quadricycles; and boats.
Our products are sold online and through dealers and distributors principally located in the United States, Canada, Western Europe, Australia, and Mexico.

Product development requires significant financial resources, technological resources, innovations (including technological advancements, such as artificial intelligence, machine learning and augmented reality) and other resources.

Unless we can continue to enhance existing products, develop and market new products and services, including in the digital and electrification markets, we may not be able to compete effectively in the market

catalysts.event: Definitive agreement to sell majority interest in Indian Motorcycle business
catalysts.sentence: On October 10, 2025, we entered into a definitive agreement to sell a majority interest in the Indian Motorcycle business, and the sale closed in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Quarterly dividend increase to $0.68 per share
catalysts.sentence: On January 29, 2026, we announced that our Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.68 per share for the first quarter of 2026, a one percent increase from the prior quarterly cash dividend, representing the 31st consecutive year of increased dividends to shareholders.

catalysts.event: Issuance of $500 million 5.60% Senior Notes due 2031
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, the Company issued $500 million aggregate principal amount of 5.60% Senior Notes due 2031 in an underwritten public offering.

tamClaims.claim: North America ORV industry retail sales of 780,000 units in 2025, 775,000 in 2024, 820,000 in 2023
tamClaims.sentence: Estimated North America and worldwide ORV industry retail sales are summarized as follows: Twelve months ended December 31, Estimated* Approximate Industry Sales (in units) 2025 2024 2023 North America ORV retail sales 780,000 775,000 820,000

tamClaims.claim: Worldwide snowmobile industry sales of approximately 90,000 units in 2025, 110,000 in 2024, 125,000 in 2023
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that worldwide industry sales of snowmobiles totaled approximately 90,000, 110,000, and 125,000 units for the 12 month seasons ended March 31, 2025, 2024, and 2023, respectively.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. powerboats market sales of approximately $15.0 billion in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: Inclusive of the segments in which we compete, we estimate total U.S. 2025 powerboats market sales were approximately $15.0 billion, with pontoon being one of the larger segments therein.
